es8311_init.message0: Initialize ES8311 audio codec %1 I2C %2 address %3
es8311_init.tooltip: Initialize ES8311 I2C communication, configure I2C bus and device address

es8311_i2s_config.message0: ES8311 %1 configure I2S MCK %2 BCK %3 WS %4 DOUT %5 DIN %6 duration(s) %7
es8311_i2s_config.tooltip: Configure ES8311 I2S audio pins and recording duration

es8311_record.tooltip: Start recording, duration set by init block

es8311_has_recording.tooltip: Check if audio has been recorded

es8311_set_mic_gain.tooltip: Set ES8311 microphone analog gain (0~42dB, step 6dB)

es8311_stop.tooltip: Stop current recording or playback, clear I2S DMA buffer

es8311_sound_detected.tooltip: Detect if ambient sound exceeds threshold (0~100), returns true if exceeded

es8311_play_tone.message0: ES8311 %1 play tone freq %2 Hz duration %3 ms
es8311_play_tone.tooltip: Generate and play a sine wave tone at specified frequency

es8311_alc_enable.tooltip: Enable or disable ES8311 Automatic Level Control (ALC)

es8311_record_slot.tooltip: Record to specified slot (0~3), each slot stores independently

es8311_play_loop.tooltip: Loop play recorded audio until stopped

es8311_qwen_config.message0: Configure ES8311 cloud audio understanding API Key %1 Base URL %2
es8311_qwen_config.tooltip: Configure the DashScope API key and compatible-mode base URL. WiFi connection is handled by existing WiFi blocks

es8311_qwen_audio_chat.message0: ES8311 %1 upload current recording to Qwen prompt %2 model %3
es8311_qwen_audio_chat.tooltip: Upload the current recording to Qwen Omni, play the voice reply in real time, and save the final text result

es8311_qwen_get_last_text.message0: get ES8311 AI last text result
es8311_qwen_get_last_text.tooltip: Return the full text result from the most recent cloud audio understanding request

es8311_qwen_get_last_success.tooltip: Check whether the most recent cloud audio understanding request succeeded

es8311_qwen_get_last_error.message0: get ES8311 AI last error message
es8311_qwen_get_last_error.tooltip: Return the error message from the most recent cloud audio understanding request
